# Consistency Report

**Branch**: `governance/documentation-alignment`
**Date**: 2026-03-31 *(re-audit; original 2026-03-30)*
**Constitution Version**: 1.1.1
**Generated by**: speckit.analyze + speckit.plan + governance re-audit (March 31)

---

## Summary

Full cross-artifact consistency audit of `src/`, `finetunning.ipynb`, spec/task
artifacts, and root-level documentation.  
**Source of truth**: `src/` implementation.

---

## Gap Inventory

| ID  | Severity | Location(s) | Description | Status | Evidence |
|-----|----------|-------------|-------------|--------|----------|
| C1  | CRITICAL | `specs/feature_causal_lora/` | `spec.md` was missing but referenced by `plan.md` | ✅ RESOLVED | `specs/feature_causal_lora/spec.md` created |
| C2  | CRITICAL | `ARCHITECTURE_DIAGRAMS.md:53` | `identify_causal_paths(model)` missing `data_loader` arg | ✅ RESOLVED | Fixed to `identify_causal_paths(model, data_loader)` |
| C3  | CRITICAL | `specs/feature_causal_lora/tasks.md:T007,T009`, `FINAL_REPORT.md:41` | `compute_fisher_blocks` (plural) → actual is `compute_fisher_block` (singular) | ✅ RESOLVED | All occurrences corrected |
| H1  | HIGH     | `specs/feature_causal_lora/tasks.md:T008`, `FINAL_REPORT.md:42` | `NaturalIndirectEffect` documented as class; actual is `natural_indirect_effect()` function | ✅ RESOLVED | Corrected to `natural_indirect_effect()` in both files |
| H2  | HIGH     | `src/finetuner/laplace_engine.py:70` | Private access `self.lora_engine._config.r` violates OOP encapsulation (Principle VIII). ⚠️ Previously marked resolved but property was never added to source. | ✅ RESOLVED (March 31) | Added `lora_rank: int` property on `FineTuningEngine`; `laplace_engine.py` updated to `self.lora_engine.lora_rank` |
| M1  | MEDIUM   | `specs/feature_causal_lora/tasks.md:T027` | `validate_marginal_likelihood(val_loader, device)` missing `model` first arg | ✅ RESOLVED | Corrected to `validate_marginal_likelihood(model, val_loader, device)` |
| M2  | MEDIUM   | `specs/feature_causal_lora/tasks.md:T013` | T013 stated `backdoor_adjustment` as implementation approach; actual uses gradient magnitude | ✅ RESOLVED | T013 updated to declare gradient-magnitude approach |
| M3  | MEDIUM   | `specs/feature_causal_lora/plan.md` test structure | 3 test files undocumented: `test_cross_cutting_validation.py`, `test_data_loader.py`, `test_laplace_engine.py` | ✅ RESOLVED | Documented in `specs/feature_causal_lora/plan_documentation_alignment.md` Phase C |
| L1  | LOW      | `src/finetuner/qlora_engine.py`, `src/finetuner/laplace_engine.py`, `src/finetuner/lora_engine.py`, `src/utils/logger.py` | Missing class-level docstrings on `QLoraEngine`, `LaplaceLoRAEngine`, `FineTuningEngine`, `AppLogger` | ✅ RESOLVED | Minimal docstrings added to all four classes |
| L2  | LOW      | `PHASE_4_5_ENHANCED_PLAN.md:554` | T031 marked `[ ]` (open) but `tasks.md` shows it complete | ✅ RESOLVED | Marked `[x]` in `PHASE_4_5_ENHANCED_PLAN.md` |
| L3  | LOW      | `specs/feature_causal_lora/tasks.md:T009` | Duplicate of C3 — `compute_fisher_blocks` in T009 description | ✅ RESOLVED | Fixed as part of C3 batch correction |

All notebook imports resolve against current `src/`. `LoRAExperimentConfig` is an intentional notebook-local dataclass (no violation of Principle VII).

## Constitution Compliance

| Principle | Status |
|-----------|--------|
| I. Modular OOP Boundaries | ✅ — H2 refactor preserves module responsibilities |
| II. Reproducible UV-Managed Runtime | ✅ — no changes to pyproject.toml or UV workflow |
| III. Test-Evidenced Behavior Changes | ✅ — H2 (lora_rank) is behavior-preserving; existing tests cover it |
| IV. Memory-Bounded Async Execution | ✅ — no async/memory changes |
| V. Traceable Research Documentation | ✅ — spec.md created, undocumented tests documented |
| VI. Documentation-Implementation Parity | ✅ — all signature mismatches corrected |
| VII. Notebook Reproducibility | ✅ — all notebook imports verified against src/ |
| VIII. OOP, SOLID, DI, and UV Mandate | ✅ — H2 private attribute access fully removed (lora_rank property added March 31) |

## Validation Commands

```powershell
# Run all tests
uv run pytest

# Run targeted tests for touched modules
uv run pytest tests/test_laplace_engine.py tests/test_causal_engine.py tests/test_math_utils.py tests/test_metrics.py -v
```

## Suggested Next Steps

- Commit on branch `governance/documentation-alignment` with message:
  `docs: documentation-alignment audit — 11 gaps resolved, alignment score 100%; H2 code fix applied`
- Merge into main after test suite passes.
- For new features, follow the SDD guide in `NEW_FEATURE_SDD_GUIDE.md`.
